name: Rotation
description: Sets object rotation using Euler angles (degrees) or quaternion components
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Rotation

Sets object rotation using Euler angles (degrees) or quaternion components

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `x` | X (degrees) | `number` | `0` | - |
| `y` | Y (degrees) | `number` | `0` | - |
| `z` | Z (degrees) | `number` | `0` | - |
| `useQuaternion` | Use Quaternion | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `qx` | Quaternion X | `number` | `0` | - |
| `qy` | Quaternion Y | `number` | `0` | - |
| `qz` | Quaternion Z | `number` | `0` | - |
| `qw` | Quaternion W | `number` | `1` | - |
| `order` | Euler Order | `string` | `XYZ` | `XYZ`, `YXZ`, `ZXY`, `ZYX`, `YZX`, `XZY` |
